summary: Iterate learn-profile create/update commands based on multi-CLI deep exploration results
approach:
Implement 4 major iterations in 3 phases:
1. Dynamic tech stack detection based on role background
2. Enhanced profile schema with customization options
3. Profile integration with learn-plan Phase1
4. Optimized skill assessment algorithm with multi-factor verification

tasks.title: Dynamic Tech Stack Detection
tasks.description: Implement multi-stage inference pipeline to detect tech stack from user's role background. Parse role description, match keywords to tech categories, validate with user confirmation, and seed known_topics array.

tasks.title: Profile Schema Enhancement
tasks.description: Extend learn-profile.schema.json with new optional fields: time_availability, career_context, learning_history, constraints. Implement backward compatibility with lazy migration.

tasks.title: Profile Update with --goal Parameter
tasks.description: Add --goal flag to profile update command for non-interactive, goal-oriented skill assessment. Extract keywords from learning goal, run targeted assessment, update relevant known_topics.

tasks.title: Profile Integration in learn-plan Phase1
tasks.description: Modify learn-plan Phase1 to check profile existence, prompt for update with new goal, and reload profile after create/update operations. Add error handling for profile operation failures.

tasks.title: Multi-Factor Skill Assessment Algorithm
tasks.description: Optimize skill assessment with multi-factor verification: self-assessment (calibration only), open-ended conceptual checks, MCP-validated practical challenges, cross-validation with learning goal. Implement weighted scoring and anti-inflation mechanisms.

tasks.title: Simulated MCP for Code Validation
tasks.description: Build simulated MCP platform for code challenge validation. Provide code input interface, run safe sandbox execution (vm2), return test results and performance metrics.

T1.reason: Code implementation with multiple files (profile.md + KeywordDictionary.json)

T2.reason: Schema modification with backward compatibility considerations

T3.reason: Profile command implementation with new flag and logic

T4.reason: Learn-plan command modification with integration logic

T5.reason: Complex algorithm implementation with multiple verification stages

T6.reason: New module implementation for code validation
